revision: v2 — corrected Gemini role framing: aesthetic optimizer, not quality scorer
core_insight: Gemini's role is aesthetic optimizer (propose concrete visual improvements), not quality scorer. Claude self-review cannot substitute this because it lacks independent aesthetic perspective. Fallback should honestly degrade to technical validation only.

top_recommendations.title: Add Bash to review-core tool list
top_recommendations.description: review-core's 5 pre-review automated checks require Bash but it is missing. Single-line fix unblocks the entire pre-review validation layer.

top_recommendations.title: Rebuild aesthetic optimization layer
top_recommendations.description: Three-part overhaul (a+c are atomic): (a) Rewrite Gemini role prompts for proactive aesthetic optimization + fix SKILL.md internal contradictions (line 81, prompt template). (b) Redefine self-review fallback as 'technical validation only' with expanded checks (text overflow, outline content coverage). (c) Enrich suggestion format: 5-type taxonomy (attribute_change, layout_restructure, full_rethink, content_reduction, deck_coordination) + layout_suggestion field. Followed by mandatory calibration run (8-10 slides) before Wave 3.
top_recommendations.calibration_gate: Production run (8-10 slides) required after Wave 2 to validate Gemini suggestion quality and taxonomy coverage before proceeding to Wave 3

top_recommendations.title: Fix resource budget misalignment (maxTurns + signal batching)
top_recommendations.description: content-core 25→35, slide-core 30→20, review-core 15→20. Batch draft signals every 3 slides.

top_recommendations.title: Harden resume: outline approval marker + atomic writes
top_recommendations.description: Resume can bypass Phase 4 Hard Stop and lose completed work on crash. Fix: approved field in outline.json + atomic write for slide-status.json.

top_recommendations.title: Add chart_colors token + suggestion-driven fix strategy
top_recommendations.description: chart_colors palette for multi-series data viz. Fix loop driven by Gemini optimization suggestion type (5 types: attribute_change / layout_restructure / full_rethink / content_reduction / deck_coordination). Requires calibration run data from R2.
top_recommendations.note: R5a (chart_colors) in Wave 2, R5b (fix strategy) in Wave 3 after calibration

additional_recommendations.title: Holistic deck aesthetic coherence review (Gemini)
additional_recommendations.note: Design + protocol in Wave 3, implementation in early Wave 4. Cross-slide aesthetic coherence is Gemini's most irreplaceable contribution.

additional_recommendations.title: Missing SVG patterns (table, metric grid, grouped bar, network diagram)
Memory scope none for slide-core and review-core

constraints: 4-agent architecture is validated — do not decompose or merge agents
Star topology (no agent-to-agent communication) is correct
File-based state machine is the right resume pattern — harden it, do not replace it
Gemini's role is aesthetic optimizer — all review prompts must reflect this, not compliance checker framing
Claude self-review CANNOT substitute Gemini's aesthetic perspective — fallback must honestly degrade to technical validation only
Graceful degradation pattern must be preserved: Gemini available → full aesthetic optimization; unavailable → technical validation only (no fake aesthetic review)
Pipeline overlap (Phase 5 to 6) is architecturally sound — simplify signaling but keep the pipeline
All changes must be backward-compatible with existing run directories

unresolved_decisions.title: Agent infra model override support
unresolved_decisions.description: Sonnet for attribute-level fix rounds (U-14) requires either two agent variants or Task() model override. Current agent YAML frontmatter fixes the model at definition time.

unresolved_decisions.title: Technical validation implementation form
unresolved_decisions.description: Pre-review technical validation (R2b) can be: (a) bash script called by review-core, (b) validation checks inlined in review-core prompt, (c) separate validation step in orchestrator before spawning review-core.

unresolved_decisions.title: Optimization suggestion type taxonomy
unresolved_decisions.description: R5's suggestion-driven fix strategy uses 5-type taxonomy (attribute_change, layout_restructure, full_rethink, content_reduction, deck_coordination). Must be validated against actual Gemini outputs from Wave 2 calibration run. Taxonomy may need expansion or collapse based on real data.
